# @mongez/dom

> Browser-side DOM utilities. Flat, side-effect-free function exports for page metadata, fonts, stylesheets, CSS variables, keyboard helpers, viewport dimensions, and small DOM conveniences. No runtime dependencies.

This package targets the browser. There is no SSR layer — calling `setTitle` / `googleFont` / `userPrefersDarkMode` on the server will throw because `document`, `window.matchMedia`, and `FontFace` don't exist there. Guard with `typeof window !== "undefined"` at the call site, or call from a client-only effect.

Every export ships from the package root.

## Docs

- [Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/skills/overview.md): Pitch, install, mental model.
- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/README.md): Marketing-style index.
- [Changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release notes.

## Reference (by area)

- [Metadata](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/skills/metadata.md): `setPageMeta`, `setTitle`, `setDescription`, `setKeywords`, `setImage`, `setPageColor`, `setFavIcon`, `setCanonicalUrl`, `getMetaData`, and the social/Open-Graph fan-out.
- [Head elements](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/skills/head-elements.md): Lower-level helpers — `createHeadElement`, `createNewMeta`, `meta`, `itemprop`, `metaLink`, `styleSheet`, `twitter`, `og`. Plus the element-attribute helpers `setHTMLAttributes`, `setElementAttributes`, `getElementAttributes`.
- [Assets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/skills/assets.md): Loading external resources — `googleFont`, `loadFont`, `styleSheet`, `loadScript`, `cssVariable`, `setCssVariable`, `getCssVariable`.
- [Interactions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/skills/interactions.md): User-input + viewport helpers — `pressed`, `TAB_KEY`/`ESC_KEY`/`ENTER_KEY`/`CONTROL_KEY`, `scrollTo`, `userPrefersDarkMode`, `htmlToText`, `getWindowWidth`/`getWindowHeight`/`getScreenWidth`/`getScreenHeight`.

## Recipes

- [Recipes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/skills/recipes.md): Per-page metadata in a SPA, multi-weight font loading, dark-mode CSS-variable theming, keyboard-shortcut tables, smooth-scrolling table of contents.

## Quick rules

1. Flat imports: `import { setPageMeta, googleFont, cssVariable, scrollTo } from "@mongez/dom"`. No subpath entry points.
2. Browser-only. There is no server-safe build — guard with `typeof window !== "undefined"` if the same module loads on the server.
3. Functions that emit `<head>` tags reuse existing tags by their key attribute (e.g. `meta[property="og:title"]`). Repeat calls update instead of duplicating.
4. `meta(name, value)` uses `name=` for `description` and `keywords` only; everything else lands on `property=`.
5. `styleSheet(href, id)` and `googleFont(href, id)` reuse a link by its id when provided. Without an id, a new link with `id="link-<random>"` is created on each call.
6. `setHTMLAttributes` is `setElementAttributes(document.documentElement, ...)`.
7. `pressed(event, key)` reads `event.keyCode || event.charCode`. The exported `*_KEY` constants are numeric keycodes.

## Known bugs (see CHANGELOG)

- `setFavIcon` and `setCanonicalUrl` write to `currentMetaData.color` instead of their own fields — `getMetaData("favIcon")` / `getMetaData("url")` will not reflect the change.
- `setPageColor` emits `meta[property="theme-color"]` instead of the spec-defined `meta[name="theme-color"]`.

## Optional

- [Full single-file reference (llms-full.txt)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hassanzohdy/dom/main/llms-full.txt): All reference content concatenated.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/hassanzohdy/dom): Source code, issues, releases.
